title: Senior Doctor - Granules India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Granules India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Granules India in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Granules India:
Granules India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India!
